description: Design a wind turbine blade that transitions from a cylindrical root to an aerodynamic profile using NACA 0099 and NACA 4412 airfoils. The blade design must include three stations with linear interpolation: at 0.0m (Chord: 1.2m, Twist: 0, Foil: NACA 0099), at 2.0m (Chord: 1.2m, Twist: 0, Foil: NACA 4412), and at 12.0m (Chord: 0.6m, Twist: -2, Foil: NACA 4412). Export the blade geometry table to /home/ga/Documents/projects/root_transition_geometry.dat and save the project file to /home/ga/Documents/projects/blade_design_task.wpa.
